overall.description: First-person driving footage through Night City in Cyberpunk 2077. The player drives through covered industrial streets with construction barriers, transitions through a concrete tunnel, emerges onto open highways lined with palm trees, and navigates neon-lit commercial districts with large digital billboards and hotel signs. The atmosphere is dark and moody with characteristic cyberpunk neon lighting in green, pink, and blue hues.

segments.scene_description: Driving through a covered industrial street lined with yellow construction barriers. The NCPD digital billboard is visible on the left while an overhead pedestrian bridge spans the road ahead. Sparse pedestrians walk along the sidewalks in this enclosed urban corridor with artificial overhead lighting.

events.description: entering dark concrete tunnel underpass with artificial lighting

agents.ego_description: driving through the dimly lit tunnel with concrete walls on both sides

entered.detail: smooth concrete walls of the underpass tunnel
overhead fluorescent lights illuminating the tunnel interior

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a dark concrete tunnel underpass, transitioning from the covered street to an enclosed space with smooth concrete walls and overhead fluorescent lighting. The environment is devoid of pedestrians and other vehicles, creating an isolated atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: open highway with palm trees and commercial billboards

events.description: exiting tunnel into open highway with palm trees and city lights visible

agents.ego_description: driving on open highway passing palm trees and approaching commercial district with billboards

chain link fence running along the right side of the road
elevated highway or monorail track crossing overhead
illuminated gas station canopy with bright lights

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the scene opens into a wide highway with palm trees visible against the night sky. The vehicle passes a gas station on the left while driving alongside a chain-link fence. Commercial buildings and digital billboards become visible in the distance as the car follows a red vehicle ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial intersection with hotels and digital billboards

events.description: entering commercial district with neon hotel signs and large digital billboards
approaching traffic light at intersection while navigating turn

agents.ego_description: navigating through commercial area with neon signs, turning left at intersection with traffic light

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white clothing walking on sidewalk near hotel entrance

entered.detail: building with bright blue neon HOTEL sign on facade
multiple large digital screens displaying advertisements above the street
traffic signal showing red light at the intersection ahead
concrete barriers dividing the road lanes

segments.scene_description: Driving through a vibrant commercial district dominated by a large hotel with bright blue neon signage and massive digital billboards overhead. The vehicle navigates a left turn at an intersection, passing pedestrians on the sidewalks while approaching a traffic light. The atmosphere is distinctly cyberpunk with intense neon lighting and dense urban architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transitions from a claustrophobic industrial corridor into a vibrant, neon-drenched commercial district. It begins by navigating a covered street lined with yellow construction barriers and NCPD billboards, passing under a pedestrian bridge beneath artificial overhead lighting. The camera then plunges into the isolation of a dark concrete tunnel, where the urban noise vanishes and the view is restricted to smooth walls and fluorescent lights. As the vehicle emerges from the underpass, the environment opens into a wide highway flanked by palm trees and a gas station, following another car toward a distant skyline of digital displays. The scene finally shifts into a dense commercial hub, turning left at an intersection beneath massive blue hotel signage and towering billboards that bathe the city in intense cyberpunk neon.
